title: Why Taco Bell's International Strategy Could Boost Yum! Brands
text: The chain may finally have the right strategy in place to successfully expand globally like its sister brands, KFC and Pizza Hut.

title: Yum Brands' Mostly Franchised Business Model May Be Well-Positioned For Elevated Inflation
text: What we like most about Yum! Brands, particularly in an inflationary environment, is that ~98% of its restaurants are operated by franchisees or under license agreements. Nearly six years ago, Yum! Brands spun off its China business to Yum China Holdings, and it collects a fee of 3% of system sales on that business, too.

title: KFC GLOBAL NAMES TARUN LAL PRESIDENT OF KFC U.S. BUSINESS
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky. , June 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kentucky Fried Chicken (KFC) announced today that Tarun Lal has been named President of KFC U.S., effective July 15, 2022.

title: Should Investors Take a Bite of Yum Brands?
text: Yum Brands Inc. ( YUM , Financial) is one of the best restaurant stocks in 2022, in my opinion. It's got everything from strong and growing brands to global appeal and now a lower share price thanks to an earnings miss and the broader stock market tumble.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain YUM! Brands (YUM) Stock Now
text: Yum! Brands' (YUM) focus on streamlining food preparation process and improvement in delivery capabilities bodes well. However, inflationary pressures are a concern.

title: Yum Brands' Geographic Diversification Is Good For Its Growth
text: In the last five years, Yum! Brands' total revenue grew at a CAGR of 2.9%. Sales for all its four divisions grew impressively in the latest quarter.

title: Taco Bell COO: Vertical Concepts Are the Drive-Thrus of the Future
text: With the dramatic shifts in restaurant customer behavior seen in the past couple of years, major brands are rethinking their store formats to target the needs and expectations of the new digital diner. From pickup-only locations to virtual brands to mobile-integrated, drive-thru formats, quick-service restaurant (QSR) chains are shifting their focus away from the dining […]

title: Taco Bell Launches Defy Concept: How The Fast Food Brand Is Innovating With Drive-Thru Experiences
text: Fast food giant Taco Bell is launching its “Taco Bell Defy” restaurant on Tuesday, June 7. Here is what makes this new restaurant stand out.

title: YUM Stock: Taco Bell Mexican Pizza Shortage Takes Item Off Menu
text: Yum! Brands (YUM) stock is slipping Wednesday after subsidiary Taco Bell revealed a shortage affecting the Mexican Pizza. The post YUM Stock: Taco Bell Mexican Pizza Shortage Takes Item Off Menu appeared first on InvestorPlace.
